name: Temporary Remediation Site Inventory Configuration
description:
Create a new facility record for 'Site 42 - Soil Remediation'. Since it is a remote site, check the box for 'Check if there is no street address'. Enter Latitude: 35.2456, Longitude: -106.5890. Set Manned status to Unmanned and Maximum No. of Occupants to 0.

Next, navigate to the Chemical Inventory section and add a new pure chemical for Ammonium Nitrate (CAS: 6484-52-2). Set EHS (Extremely Hazardous Substance) to No, and Physical State to Solid. Under Hazards, check 'Oxidizer', 'Explosive', and 'Serious eye damage or eye irritation'. 

Configure the Inventory and Storage details: 
- Days On-Site: 45
- Maximum Daily Amount: 15,000 lbs
- Average Daily Amount: 12,000 lbs
- Storage Type: Bag
- Pressure: Ambient pressure
- Temperature: Ambient temperature
- Location Description: Temporary Storage Tent A

Save the chemical and facility changes. Finally, export the submission (File > Export > Tier2 Submit file). Select to export ONLY 'Site 42 - Soil Remediation'. Save the exported file to 'C:\workspace\site42_update.t2s'.
